title: pelargonium × severum
intro: Pelargonium × severum, a hybrid of the pelargonium species, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. It is also known as Mountain Rose, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
